builds.build_description_eng: Focuses on Infernus's Afterburn. Great on low max HP enemies. Horrible against tankier enemies.
builds.name: DoT

builds.build_description_eng: Focuses on denying healing and resistance from the enemy team. Weak to burst damage or long range comps.
builds.name: Anti-Tank

builds.build_description_eng: Focuses on Infernus' Flame Dash ability. Great for grounded team fight focused enemies. AWFUL against any CC.
builds.name: Flame Dash
